module.name: notify
module.spec: Notify creates a notification message for a stock event. The message format is: "[STOCK] <item_name>: <quantity> remaining". There are no category or priority fields in the notification text. See low_stock report which triggers notifications.

SendAlert dispatches a notification to the configured alert channel (stdout by default). The alert is formatted by FormatNotification before sending. If the alert channel is unavailable, the error is logged but not returned (best-effort delivery).

FormatNotification wraps a message in a standard envelope: timestamp prefix (RFC3339), severity level in brackets, then the message body. The format is: "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z [INFO] message". No item metadata (category, priority) is included in the envelope.
